zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Sherman於1548年6月8日出生在英國艾可迪德哈姆時，他的父親Henry Sherman37歲，母親Agnes Perpoynt28歲。他於1569年4月25日與Anne Pellett在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1600年12月22日在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆享年52歲，埋葬在英國艾可迪德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Sherman于1548年6月8日出生在英国艾可迪德哈姆时，他的父亲Henry Sherman37岁，母亲Agnes Perpoynt28岁。他于1569年4月25日与Anne Pellett在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1600年12月22日在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆享年52岁，埋葬在英国艾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Sherman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): occupational name denoting someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherman, shirman, sharman ‘shearman’.
Americanized form of North German Schürmann (see Schuermann ) and of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schermann .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, from Yiddish sher ‘scissors’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Schuermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Guenter, Hans, Heiner, Klaus, Kurt, Udo.

North German (Schürmann): habitational name for someone from a place called Schüre(n), or a topographic name for someone who lived by a barn, from Middle Low German schüre ‘barn’. Compare Schurmann , Sherman , and Shurman .

variants.name: Shearer
meanings: Scottish and English: occupational name for a reaper of standing crops, a sheep shearer, or someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherer(e) ‘shearer’, an agent derivative of Middle English schere(n) ‘to shear’. Middle English schere denoted shears and scissors of all sizes. Compare Sherman .
Americanized form of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Scherer   or   Scherrer  , cognates of 1 above. Compare   Sharrer  .

variants.name: Shearman
meanings: English: variant of   Sherman  . The surname is also established in Ireland (Kilkenny).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Sherman was born on 8 June 1548, in Dedham, Essex, England, his father, Henry Sherman, was 37 and his mother, Agnes Perpoynt, was 28. He married Anne Pellett on 25 April 1569, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 December 1600, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Dedham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Sherman est né le 8 juin 1548, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Henry Sherman, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Perpoynt, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Anne Pellett le 25 avril 1569, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 décembre 1600, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Sherman am 8. Juni 1548 in Dedham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Sherman 37 und seine Mutter Agnes Perpoynt 28. Er hat am 25. April 1569 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom Anne Pellett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Dezember 1600 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dedham, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Sherman è nato il il 8 giugno 1548 nel Dedham, Essex, England, il suo padre, Henry Sherman, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Perpoynt, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Anne Pellett il 25 aprile 1569, nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 dicembre 1600, nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Dedham, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Shermanが1548年6月8日にイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父Henry Shermanは37歳，母Agnes Perpoyntは28歳であった。1569年4月25日にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムでAnne Pellettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1600年12月22日にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムで52歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスデドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Sherman(이)가 1548년 6월 8일 영국 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Sherman(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Perpoynt(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1569년 4월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 Anne Pellett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1600년 12월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.8 June 1548–22 December 1600: 8 de junho de 1548–22 de dezembro de 1600
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Sherman nasceu em 8 de junho de 1548, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Sherman, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Perpoynt, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Pellett em 25 de abril de 1569, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1600, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Sherman родился 8 июня 1548 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Sherman было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Perpoynt, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Pellett 25 апреля 1569 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 декабря 1600 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия.

es.8 June 1548–22 December 1600: 8 de junio de 1548–22 de diciembre de 1600
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Sherman nació el 8 de junio de 1548, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Sherman, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes Perpoynt, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Anne Pellett el 25 de abril de 1569, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1600, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra.
